title: Roseanna McCoy
writer: John Collier, Alberta Hannum, Ben Hecht
actors: Farley Granger, Joan Evans, Charles Bickford
plot: The saga of the Hatfield-and-McCoy feud is romanticized in Samuel Goldwyn's "Roseanna McCoy." Newcomer Joan Evans stars as the title character, whose elopement with Johnse Hatfield serves to further fuel the flames of the deadly m...
